evidence_rows.reading: The first v6 lane only becomes legal after the new catalyst-supported batch is fully bootstrap-ready.
V6 should open from the strongest current specialist pocket instead of from a generic lane guess.
The first v6 lane stays tied to the unresolved training gaps, with catalyst context supporting rather than replacing the mainline objective.

interpretation: V6 is now a real substrate in the specialist map, so it is legal to open one bounded lane if the current map still shows unresolved carry and persistence gaps.
That lane should come from the strongest current v6 specialist pocket, not from broad widening or from a catalyst-led branch switch.
So the next healthy move is one bounded v6 lane on the best specialist pocket, with all widening still disallowed.
